title: Toast notification component with animated display and type-specific styling
purpose: Displays individual notifications with appropriate icons, colors, and animations based on notification type, and handles user dismissal.
module_context: Exports a Toast component that renders notifications with type-specific styling, icons, and animations. Includes several SVG icon components for different toast types and a close button.

steps.content: Determine the visual styling for the toast based on its type.
Select the appropriate icon component for the toast type.
Render the toast container with appropriate classes and animation.
Display the icon on the left side of the toast.
Show the title and optional message in the center.
Render a dismiss button on the right side with hover effects.

methods.name: getTypeStyles
methods.normalized_params: (): { container: string; icon: string; title: string; message: string }

steps.content: Evaluate the toast type to determine appropriate styling classes.
Return container, icon, title, and message styles based on the toast type.
Select the correct icon component based on the toast type.
Apply appropriate styling to the selected icon.
Trigger the dismiss callback with the toast's unique identifier.
